title: eleocharis capitata var. dispar
intro: Eleocharis capitata var. dispar, also known as spike-rush, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Eleocharis capitata var. dispar is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
